title: About BTC Seer
description: AI-powered Bitcoin analysis and trading platform
heroSubtitle: Real-time predictions, trading signals, and deep market analysis — powered by a 4-model AI ensemble analyzing 192 features across 13 data categories.

whatIs.title: WHAT IS BTC SEER?
whatIs.p1: BTC Seer is a production-grade Bitcoin prediction platform that analyzes 192 engineered features across 13 categories — technical indicators, news sentiment, on-chain metrics, derivatives data, macro markets, ETF flows, exchange flows, stablecoin supply, social signals, and more.
whatIs.p2: It generates predictions across 5 timeframes (1H, 4H, 24H, 1W, 1MO) using a 4-model ensemble: Temporal Fusion Transformer (40%), XGBoost (25%), LSTM (20%), and Google TimesFM (15%) — with adaptive weighting that shifts based on model performance.
whatIs.p3: The system runs 24 background jobs continuously — collecting data every minute, generating predictions, evaluating accuracy, retraining models, and learning from market events.

howToUse.title: HOW TO USE BTC SEER
howToUse.subtitle: New here? Follow these 5 steps to get started:
howToUse.step1_desc: — check the live BTC price, dual prediction cards (AI + Quant), trading signals, and market overview at a glance.
howToUse.step2_desc: — view AI-generated entry, target, and stop-loss levels with confidence scores and risk ratings.
howToUse.step3_desc: — browse news sentiment, Fear & Greed index, influencer mood, and social volume to gauge market emotion.
howToUse.step4_desc: — explore technical analysis (45+ indicators), Power Law, Elliott Wave, liquidation maps, on-chain metrics, and ETF flows.
howToUse.step5_desc: — use Paper Trading to test strategies with virtual money before risking real capital.

architecture.title: AI Ensemble Architecture
architecture.tftDesc: Multi-horizon attention model — captures long-range dependencies and variable-importance weighting
architecture.xgboostDesc: Gradient-boosted trees — excels at feature-based classification with 192 engineered inputs
architecture.lstmDesc: Recurrent neural network — detects sequential patterns in 168-hour (1 week) lookback windows
architecture.timesfmDesc: Zero-shot foundation model — provides a baseline from pre-trained time-series knowledge
architecture.adaptiveNote: Weights are adaptive — the system shifts allocation based on each model's recent accuracy. A sentiment modifier (up to ±50%) amplifies or dampens the ensemble signal based on real-time market mood.

items.desc: News from 25+ RSS feeds, CryptoPanic, Reddit, Binance announcements
Alt-coin prices (ETH, SOL, XRP and more)
Event classification — news categorized into regulatory, technical, market, macro, supply, exchange events
Influencer tweets — weighted by market impact (Elon, Saylor, CZ, Cathie Wood, etc.)
Funding rates, open interest, and derivatives data from Binance perpetuals
Macro indicators (DXY, gold, S&P 500, VIX, treasuries), on-chain metrics, BTC dominance, technical snapshot, phrase analysis
AI predictions (ensemble + quant theory), prediction evaluation, Telegram alerts
Auto-retraining, continuous learning, A/B testing of candidate models
Data cleanup (90d price/news, 180d macro/on-chain), subscription checks

howAiWorks.title: HOW THE AI WORKS
howAiWorks.step1_desc: 4 models independently analyze 192 features and vote on each prediction. TFT leads at 40%, but weights adapt based on recent performance — reducing individual model bias.
howAiWorks.step2_desc: Models auto-retrain every 6 hours using the latest market data. If accuracy drops below 55% or 50+ new predictions are evaluated, retraining triggers immediately.
howAiWorks.step3_desc: The system stores up to 500 historical events, tracking their actual impact at 1h, 4h, 24h, and 7d. When similar events occur, it pattern-matches to predict expected impact.
howAiWorks.step4_desc: Learns which specific news words and phrases historically move the market. Over time, this builds a language-to-price correlation map that improves sentiment accuracy.
howAiWorks.step5_desc: New model candidates compete against production models before promotion. Only models that outperform the current ensemble get deployed — ensuring quality never regresses.
howAiWorks.step6_desc: When retraining produces better weights, the ensemble hot-swaps them without stopping the prediction pipeline. Zero downtime, continuous improvement.
howAiWorks.step7_desc: Every prediction is evaluated against actual price movements and scored. Full transparency — you can see exactly how well the models perform over time.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.text: BTC Seer is an educational tool. Nothing in this app constitutes financial advice. AI predictions may be inaccurate. Always do your own research (DYOR) before making any investment decisions. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
